workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.emptyState: No saved JDs yet. Start with JD Builder or JD Analyser.

builder.title: JD Builder
builder.importDesc: Start with existing content to give Claude a head start, or skip to begin from a blank template.
builder.lastSection: You've reached the last section. Is this JD good enough?

analyser.title: JD Analyser
analyser.importDesc: Upload or paste your existing JD draft for AI analysis, quality assessment, and gap identification.

review.title: Honest Review
review.subtitle: AI assessment based on GPTs-JD-Suite_v4 quality standards. Not a final approval — human decides.
review.auditorObjections: What a pay equity auditor would object to
review.disclaimer: This review is AI-generated. Human decision required. Not a substitute for expert HR review or pay equity audit.

template.chooseDesc: Select the template that matches your purpose. The template defines which sections and fields are included in your JD.
template.builderDesc: Drag sections and fields to reorder. Toggle required/optional. Add custom fields.

import.optionalStep: This step is optional. You can skip it and start from a blank template, or upload existing content to give Claude a head start.
import.textHint: Paste any JD text, job posting, internal notes, or free-form description. The more context you provide, the better the AI analysis.
import.textPlaceholder: Paste your job description, job posting, internal notes, or any relevant text here...
import.fileDrop: Drop a file here or click to browse
import.urlHint: Enter a URL to a job posting or job description page. Note: many websites block automated access. If it fails, copy the text and use the Paste Text tab instead.

guest.tokenExpired: This review link has expired. Contact the JD owner for a new link.

company.title: Company Profile
company.description: Organisation context calibrates EIGE pathway, country overlay, SWP hypotheses and Axiomera signals.

sources.title: External Sources
sources.description: Connect careers websites to scrape live job postings for EIGE analysis and import into JD Suite.
sources.noSources: No sources yet. Add a careers website above.

rasci.title: Process Intelligence
rasci.description: Build your process-to-role RASCI map. Add roles (columns) and process steps (rows), then click cells to assign responsibility.

swp.title: Strategic Workforce Planning
swp.description: OTIF-powered workforce intelligence. Based on O-Ring AI risk analysis across all evaluated JDs in workspace.
swp.emptyState: No JDs with evaluation data yet. Open a JD, go to form, and click "Evaluate" to populate SWP signals.
swp.roleReadiness: JD Quality — Role Readiness for Pay Equity
